expectations.text: Correctly assigns all 3 MFA safeguards to IG2
expectations.evidence: States all three are IG2 in the safeguard table
Explains FIDO2/hardware keys as phishing-resistant: "cryptographically bound to origin URL"

expectations.text: Explains SMS OTP vulnerabilities (SIM swap, AiTM/real-time phishing)
expectations.evidence: Describes AiTM phishing proxies and SIM swapping as SMS OTP vulnerabilities

expectations.text: Notes CIS flags SMS OTP for privileged access as an explicit pitfall
expectations.evidence: States "SMS OTP used for privileged access" is a named CIS pitfall
